programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Robert Pattinson stars in the dual role of Gotham City’s vigilante detective and his alter ego, reclusive billionaire Bruce Wayne.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc:
Behind every great love is a great story.
In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple.
Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love.
Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: Journey To the CentER of the Earth
programme.desc: During a scientific expedition to Iceland, scientist Trevor Anderson (Fraser-- Crash, the Mummy), his nephew Sean (Josh Hutcherson) and their local guide, Hannah (Anita Briem), are trapped in a cave -- from which their only escape is to go deeper, into unimagined worlds, where the trio comes face to face with never-before-seen creatures and harrowing dangers as they race an building volcanic eruption to reach the surface!

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 22
programme.desc: When Sheldon tries to be spontaneous on "Anything Can Happen Thursday," it leads to unexpected friction between Penny, Amy and Bernadette.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 23
programme.desc: A horrible day at work prompts Penny to evaluate her life choices - including her relationship with Leonard. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette struggle to care for Mrs. Wolowitz.

programme.title: Friends S8 19
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a Soap Opera Digest crossword puzzle.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: A group of interconnected Baltimore-based twenty and thirtysomethings navigate their various relationships from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep murky waters of married life trying to read the signs of the opposite sex - and hoping to be the exceptions to the no-exceptions rule. Gigi just wants a man who says he'll call - and does - while Alex advises her to stop sitting by the phone. Beth wonders if she should call it off after years of committed singlehood with her boyfriend Neil but he doesn't think there's a single thing wrong with their unmarried life. Janine's not sure if she can trust her husband Ben who can't quite trust himself around Anna. Anna can't decide between the sexy married guy or her straightforward no-sparks standby Conor who can't get over the fact that he can't have her. And Mary who's found an entire network of loving supportive men just needs to find one who's straight.

programme.title: Body of Lies
programme.desc: Trust no one. Deceive everyone. When idealistic CIA agent Roger Ferris (Di Caprio -- the Departed, Blood Diamond) is stationed in Jordan after being wounded in Iraq, he dedicates his life to stopping further attacks by Al Qaeda. Following a plan that the British employed successfully against the Nazis, Ferris plants the suspicion among the terrorists that their leaders are collaborating with the Americans. But as the stakes rise and Ferris finds himself in the crosshairs, the plot he starts spirals into an outcome he could never have foreseen.

programme.title: Gran Torino
programme.desc: Retired auto worker, Korean War veteran and widower Walt Kowalski (Clint Eastwood) sets out to reform his neighbor, a young Hmong teenager, who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession: a 1972 Ford Gran Torino he keeps in mint condition.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S5 11

programme.title: Storage Hunters S5 12

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 15
programme.desc: Brooke meets a dominatrix who wants to teach a pomegranate a lesson, and Mack and Jack try to help a new couple beat the cohabitation curse. Plus, Kevin and Brooke test a hack that puts your baby to work.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 16
programme.desc: Have Kevin and Brooke finally found the hacked pool of their dreams in "Hack or Wack"? And in "Hack Line of Defense," rude teenagers will no longer spoil the mood, thanks to hacks that will keep them on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: Tess is sent into a community skeptical of the police to discreetly investigate a local Church’s potential links to human trafficking following the disappearance of the star soloist of the church’s choir. As the girl’s whole family comes under suspicion, Sunny brings some much needed perspective to the pressure put on many first generation kids by immigrant parents, helping Tess track the girl down in an unexpected location and uncover the dark truth behind her disappearance. The case prompts Tess to revisit a traumatic event in her childhood with Lucas and show support ahead of his wedding day.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: A fallen ‘90s supermodel (Jaime Pressly) returns to New York for a reunion and revenge, leading Elsbeth to sort through old grudges and lies to catch a killer. Meanwhile, Officer Hackett takes her turn in the spotlight.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Shunned on his return, Richard seeks redemption treating a delivery worker. Amy, TJ, Sonya and Jake juggle a tense legal case.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue, FBI agent Jack Crawford becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: A fallen ‘90s supermodel (Jaime Pressly) returns to New York for a reunion and revenge, leading Elsbeth to sort through old grudges and lies to catch a killer. Meanwhile, Officer Hackett takes her turn in the spotlight.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 3)
programme.desc: The discovery of two missing U.S. Navy aviators adrift in the Coral Sea leads the team to expose a sinister terrorist plot.

programme.title: Red Eye (Season 2)
programme.desc: The conspiracy is revealed; Hana, Brody and Delaney work together to deliver justice.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2)
programme.desc: Season 2 of NCIS: Origins delves deeper into the unstoppable NCIS Camp Pendleton team led by the legendary Mike Franks, as well as Gibbs’ early career as a special agent, and reveals the fate of Lala after last season’s devastating car crash.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: The Super Mario Bros. Movie follows Mario and Luigi on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: A post civil war drama about a colonel tracking down a man across Nevada; with whom he has unfinished business.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 6)
programme.desc: When an armored truck heist ends in bloodshed, the team races to track down priceless jewels before more lives are lost. Also, Hondo's mother, Charice, visits.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 6)
programme.desc: The team races to uncover the identities of kidnappers holding a prison guard's family hostage before it's too late. Also, Tan is faced with a difficult personal decision.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 6)
programme.desc: Following a string of violent home robberies, the team rushes to stop a crew targeting elderly victims.

programme.title: Seal Team (Season 7)
programme.desc: Even the closest of brothers fight eventually. Tempers flare during a surveillance mission in Malaysia. As the team sets up camp in scorching hot temperatures, grievances are aired and Drew finally reveals why he’s been so closed off.

programme.title: Seal Team (Season 7)
programme.desc: BRAVO’s next mission is to capture Jun Yilin in Cambodia, but they’ll be without their leaders. Ray is pulled into diplomatic negotiations and Jason travels home to help his son recover from surgery—a task that takes a dramatic turn for the worse.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 33
programme.desc: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: Anzac Day: Gallipoli Dawn Service 2026
programme.desc: The Gallipoli Dawn Service from Anzac Cove in Turkiye. Australia's Governor-General Sam Mostyn will be in attendance as we mark 110 years since Australian, NZ and other Commonwealth troops landed at Gallipoli in 1915.

programme.title: Anzac Day: Villers-Bretonneux Dawn Service 2026
programme.desc: One of the key commemorative events on Anzac Day. From the Australian National Memorial in Villers-Bretonneux, France - we honour the service and sacrifice by Australians on the Western Front in WWI.

programme.title: When The War Is Over - Gallipoli
programme.desc: Rachel Griffiths follows in the footsteps of director Peter Weir to understand how his 1981 blockbuster film unintentionally brought an ailing Anzac legend roaring back to life.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 7 - Essendon v Collingwood
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 7 - Port Adelaide v Geelong Cats
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Ghosts of Saigon
programme.desc: As the Vietnam War neared its chaotic end, thousands of children were evacuated. Some arrived in Australia through Operation Babylift. This documentary traces the emotional journey of those adopted into Australian families.

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - One Day Revolution
programme.desc: It was the original cricket revolution, and the game hasn't been the same since. The '80s saw the rise of the one-day format, capturing a new generation of fans and turning the gentleman's game into a new national obsession.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 10
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 8
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight - Episode 33
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 14
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year - Episode 8
programme.desc: In the Grand Final, three outstanding artists each have four hours to paint a portrait of adored comedy icon Denise Scott, each drawing on their unique approach to artmaking.

programme.title: Asia News Week - Episode 14
programme.desc: Yvonne Yong brings you a weekly roundup of the stories making news across the Asia region, plus what's trending on social media and making an impact on the culture and the way people live.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia - Episode 3
programme.desc: The Emergency Medical Dispatchers at Brisbane's operation centre are under the pump from the start of their shift with calls averaging two per minute.

programme.title: The Matchmakers - Episode 3
programme.desc: Delving deeper into the matchmaker's tried and tested techniques, more singles are encouraged to go on second dates and look beyond superficiality.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 8
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: The Pacific - Episode 6
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 14
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 12
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - One Day Revolution
programme.desc: It was the original cricket revolution, and the game hasn't been the same since. The '80s saw the rise of the one-day format, capturing a new generation of fans and turning the gentleman's game into a new national obsession.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 34
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 34
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: Insiders - Episode 13
programme.desc: Start your Sunday morning with the show the politicians rely on to find out what's going on. David Speers presents Australia's must-watch political program, joined by a panel of the best political analysts and commentators.

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 12
programme.desc: Host Abbey Gelmi and a panel of leading sportswriters, commentators and athletes examine the big issues, highlights and news in sport. For 20 years, Offsiders has been here to unpack all the action, both on and off the field.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 12
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Back Roads - Great Keppel, QLD
programme.desc: Back Roads heads to Queensland's Great Keppel Island. Once a paradise for partygoers, Heather Ewart meets the locals looking for a better way to share their pristine backyard with the rest of the world.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 10
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 34
programme.desc: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant star in this delightful romantic comedy about a world-famous movie star who falls in love with a bookstore owner while the whole world watches.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: A typical married couple a little bored with their relationship come to discover that they are enemy assassins hired to kill each other.

programme.title: Don't Say A Word
programme.desc: When Dr. Nathan Conrad's daughter is kidnapped, a secret held by one of his catatonic patients may be his only hope.

programme.title: Creature From The Black Lagoon
programme.desc: In one of the most beloved sci-fi horror classics ever, a mysterious amphibious monster escapes captivity in order to be with a scientist’s beautiful female lab assistant.

programme.title: The Howling
programme.desc: After a bizarre and near fatal encounter with a serial killer, a television newswoman is sent to a remote mountain resort whose residents may be protecting the secret of a mythical monster.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: The Specialist
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Sharon Stone star in this hard-edged thriller about an ex-CIA explosives expert (Stallone) who helps a seductive beauty (Stone) avenge the murder of her parents by a powerful Cuban-American crime boss.

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen
programme.desc: Danny Ocean and the gang would have only one reason to pull off their riskiest casino heist - to defend one of their own. But they’re going to need more than luck on their side to break “The Bank.”

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder happens, and the suspects get killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy over two generations.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder happens, and the suspects get killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy over two generations.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Drug Runner Lover
programme.desc: After investigating a drug smuggler for years, police finally receive information that leads to his arrest but he refuses to talk. Police have just 8 hours to identify, locate and arrest the entire ring.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: The search for a missing priest leads detectives on a multi-state manhunt for a suspect who may be the only person with the answers to his whereabouts.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After the dismembered remains of a missing woman are found in a freezer, investigators uncover a love triangle and a murderous conspiracy to conceal the truth.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: After a woman calls 911 to report shooting her boyfriend in self-defence, investigators uncover a pristine crime scene and disturbing behaviour that cast doubt on her story.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception
programme.desc: Matheau Moore sits down for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo. Though he was found not guilty of murdering his wife, suspicions still follow him—even among those closest to the case.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: During a welfare check, authorities discover a man has been living with the mummified bodies of his family. Pathologists cannot determine if they died naturally or if something nefarious occurred.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1)
programme.desc: A man hangs on the hood of his car while his ex-girlfriend drives it on the highway. An intoxicated woman flees from airport police on a motorised suitcase; and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a 911 call about cold fries leads to an arrest for murder; a fugitive is caught on the toilet; and more!

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Marjorie's husband, Irv, has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's Disease and has already taken two dangerous falls in the house where the EMTs could not get to him.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A young man is taken into custody for public intoxication, while a woman is arrested for lying to police. In Modesto, a teen is hit with a felony charge for criminal threats of violence.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Troubled teen Alyssa Bustamante was a self-styled 'bad girl' who said she wanted to know how it felt to kill. She gave in to this curiosity and murdered her nine-year-old neighbour Elizabeth Olten.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A woman who killed her husband is disowned by her children in court; a teacher who slept with her teenaged students apologises to the victims' families; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: An irate plaintiff storms out of her virtual hearing and is charged with contempt; a quadruple murderer sobs uncontrollably at sentencing; a judge breaks down laughing at a defendant's complaints.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: Tulsa homicide delves into a dark world of drugs and prostitution to solve the murder of a man executed in his car in a motel parking lot.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: After an immigrant, lured by a woman, is beaten to death, Gwinnett County Police discover that one of the three suspects believes no one will care about him because he's Mexican.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: A construction worker is killed by a stray bullet during an attempted robbery inside a trailer park, but when investigators follow the trail of the suspects, things are not what they seem.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lucy gets jealous of Lola's newfound attention after she joins the Mortician's Club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's family open their own restaurant...directly next to the Chum Bucket. // SpongeBob suddenly finds everything funny...much to everyone's annoyance.

programme.desc: After the Science Scouts begin selling biscuits to fund a trip to Mars, Mr. Krabs joins the ring and turns it into a competition.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes’ tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.desc: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. // Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luna needs to get rid of a nasty case of the hiccups before a big rock competition. // The Morticians Club plan Bertrand's escape from the cruise ship his parents work on.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori becomes a celebrity at school when she hits a hole-in-one on a notoriously difficult course. // The cheerleaders challenge Lynn and her teammates to a 'cheer off' when Lynn dismisses them as athletes.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Annoyed by Leni's intrusive babysitting, Lisa accidentally blasts herself and Todd into space. // Lola tries to whip Mom into tip-top pageant condition for a Mother-Daughter pageant.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe discover that Lazlo Chance may be the evil Mastermind and enlist Chloe to help. But when Chloe is torn between her head and her heart, it threatens the entire mission.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: When B.C. forces Chloe to steal a magical amulet that grants him superhero powers, the Thundermans unite to stop his plan. Chloe must reveal her identity to save her friends.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Mika gets a fine lesson on the art of not snitching, but a surprise from Schwoz's Mom might cause her to fail the test.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When Henry’s crush goes on a Valentine’s date with someone else, Schwoz provides an android to make her jealous. Ray has an unpleasant date with one of Henry’s teachers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild in town, but SpongeBob has a handy friend to help them out. // SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work, but how will he spend his precious time?

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs's house while he's away, so he takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in. // Squidward is forced to room with Patrick, but his domineering demeanor rubs off on Patrick more than he'd like.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans out the boating school lighthouse, where he finds a cute but inconvenient companion. // No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Marky's favorite social media influencer Beastie Pie, is hosting a gross food-eating competition at BoomBox Burger. When Sadie and Lay Lay overhear Beastie plans to rig the contest, they must work together to convince Marky that Beastie is a fraud.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When a suspicious new student shows up at school, Charlotte and Henry think he may be up to something. Captain Man goes undercover as a substitute teacher to learn more.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Trouble follows Henry home from his superhero life when a piece of rock from outer space turns out to be more than it seems.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: ShoutOut has a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to sell a movie to Hollywood bigshot Deuce Van Nuys, but when her mind goes blank under the pressure, the rest of Danger Force pitch in and share their own epic--and epically bad--movie ideas.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie says on the air that he is not a fan of internet sensation Fred, causing Fred to announce the end of his videos forever. Fans are infuriated that Freddie has caused an end to the popular videos.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: When Tori finds out that Cat is dating her ex-boyfriend, her jealousy threatens to ruin their relationship. Meanwhile, Trina uses fish to make everyone's feet super smooth but at what cost?

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Cat invents a holiday, "Yay Day", which is just an excuse to buy presents for everyone. When Cat snoops what other people have gotten her, she discovers an insulting present from Sam.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: When the Lair floods, April goes to save Splinter... but he won't leave the sewer! To make matters worse, the mutant called GOLDFIN comes with a warning... stay out of his way, or else!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donnie and Wingnut go to restore power to the Lair but get trapped by the East River 3! The water is rising and they're not alone... there's a monster down there with them!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff's new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving. // Mr. Krabs and Plankton must work together after discovering a well of miracle-grease under their restaurants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Karen tells the fairytale of a nerd trying to steal an action figure from his three little neighbors. // Squidward hosts a secret "We Hate SpongeBob Club" at his house.

programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Best and Bester
